case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. RYAN C. COX et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-03-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-08-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
